use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms, dialogs, and call-to-action sections
Destructive actions like delete or cancel confirmations
Navigation and link-like interactions with ghost and link variants
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbars and tooltips
Secondary actions and alternative pathway controls
ai_summary: A versatile atomic button component with multiple variants and sizes using Radix UI Slot for composition and class-variance-authority for variant management. Supports default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link variants with small, default, large, and icon size options.
